name: FAQ / Auto-Reply Bot
description: Auto-replies to inbound WhatsApp messages from configurable FAQ keyword/regex rules.
author: Yudhi Armyndharis <yudhi@rmyndharis.com>

rules.title: Rules (JSON)
rules.description: JSON array of { mode: 'contains'|'exact'|'regex', pattern: string, reply: string }.

fallbackReply.title: Fallback reply
fallbackReply.description: Sent when no rule matches. Leave empty to stay silent.

fallbackCooldownSec.title: Fallback cooldown (seconds per chat)
fallbackCooldownSec.description: Minimum seconds between fallback replies to the same chat. 0 = reply every time.

es.name: Bot de Preguntas Frecuentes / Respuesta Automática
es.description: Responde automáticamente a los mensajes entrantes de WhatsApp mediante reglas configurables de palabras clave y expresiones regulares.

fallbackCooldownSec.title: Tiempo de espera alternativo (segundos por chat)

fr.name: Bot FAQ / Réponse Automatique
fr.description: Répond automatiquement aux messages WhatsApp entrants via des règles configurables de mots-clés et expressions régulières.

it.name: Bot FAQ / Risposta Automatica
it.description: Risponde automaticamente ai messaggi WhatsApp in entrata tramite regole configurabili di parole chiave ed espressioni regolari.

ar.name: بوت الأسئلة الشائعة / الرد التلقائي
ar.description: يرد تلقائيًا على رسائل WhatsApp الواردة وفق قواعد قابلة للتهيئة من كلمات مفتاحية وتعابير نمطية.

fallbackCooldownSec.title: فترة انتظار الرد الاحتياطي (ثوانٍ لكل محادثة)

he.name: בוט שאלות נפוצות / מענה אוטומטי
he.description: מגיב אוטומטית להודעות WhatsApp נכנסות לפי כללי מילות מפתח וביטויים רגולריים ניתנים להגדרה.

te.name: FAQ / ఆటో-రిప్లై బాట్
te.description: కాన్ఫిగర్ చేయదగిన FAQ కీవర్డ్/రెగ్యులర్ ఎక్స్‌ప్రెషన్ నియమాల ద్వారా వచ్చే WhatsApp సందేశాలకు స్వయంచాలకంగా జవాబిస్తుంది.

zh-CN.name: FAQ / 自动回复机器人
zh-CN.description: 通过可配置的 FAQ 关键词/正则表达式规则，自动回复入站的 WhatsApp 消息。

fallbackCooldownSec.title: 兜底冷却时间（每个聊天秒数）

zh-HK.name: FAQ / 自動回覆機器人
zh-HK.description: 透過可設定的 FAQ 關鍵字/正規表示式規則，自動回覆入站的 WhatsApp 訊息。

fallbackCooldownSec.title: 後備冷卻時間（每個聊天秒數）
